Where do I even begin on Palworld. I can't even believe this game actually got made, and yet it is so peak. Our Palworld arc was some genuine good ol classic Jakelliot video gaming. Late nights exploring the map and catching weird ass pals with our pal spheres, shooting pals and people, searching for the largest eggs, fighting bosses, it was honestly so fire. We made slave camps, we caught an actual human and named him Noah Masliah, which is fucking hilarious. While I don't have the urge to play anymore, I look back on our world with a great fondness, because I can recognize the peak that was offered to us. Palworld was go go goated. Also, Palworld was so good I drove to your house to deliver you a diet coke so we could keep playing in peak conditions, THATS DEDICATION.
